note: Values from the EN 15804+A2:2019 Environmental Impacts table (page 13). 'Climate Change [kg CO2 eq.]' = total (4.96 = fossil 5.28 + biogenic -0.341 + land use change 0.0195). A separate GWP-GHG indicator is not reported (only a note that >90% specific data used for GWP-GHG). Land use change GWP A1-A3 = 0.0195 not included separately.
